name: Christina Reynolds, EMILY's List
subject: BREAKING: Senate votes on abortion ban
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5400/24c69fd9/129636b7f/189510b4/3391094771/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEM54N_digital_email_20180129_SenateAbortionBanVote_inact&source=WQEFEM54N_digital_email_20180129_SenateAbortionBanVote_inact")
---

Peter,

A vote to advance an abortion ban was just narrowly defeated in the Senate -- where every single one of our women opposed it.

Without them, this bill -- which the House passed and President Trump _requested be sent to his desk_ -- could be on its way to becoming law and curbing abortion access nationwide.

With Republicans controlling both chambers of Congress and the White House, it's been incredibly difficult to stop anti-choice bills like this. That's why flipping the House and Senate with pro-choice Democratic women is a top priority this November.

**Donate $3 toward our $150,000 End-of-Month goal and help our candidates turn Congress blue and put an end to these anti-choice attacks:**

name: Jenny Nadicksbernd
subject: Thanks as always
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Hey -- this is Jenny, Sen. Kaine's finance director. Tim emailed you yesterday with a request to make a contribution before our first deadline of 2018.

**This is a critical one. If we can reach our goal of $30,000, we'll know that we're starting this election year off on the right foot. Tim always likes to say to me, "It's not about the money, it's about the many." And he's right: It's not simply about the dollars we raise -- it's about all the people who join together to support Tim and his campaign.
**
I know you're someone we rely on for support, and I know Tim appreciates you so much. I haven't had a chance to check our books yet, but if you haven't already pitched in to this goal, [**will you consider donating today?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=QB8hr5FxijsL6gqP5xamB2l3bRE0BQ%2BE) And if you have, you have my sincere thanks -- but I'd be a pretty bad finance director for Tim if I didn't ask you to [**dig deep and make one more donation**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=wEWb%2Bsf%2BkNEORk%2FDktYBCml3bRE0BQ%2BE) before we hit tomorrow night's deadline.

The entire Kaine team is so grateful for people like you. You make it possible for us to hire staff, to travel around and talk to Virginians in every corner of the Commonwealth, and to build up the most competitive campaign we possibly can.

Thanks as always,

Jenny

Jenny Nadicksbernd
Finance Director
Kaine for Virginia 2018

name: Keith Ellison
subject: You probably missed this news, Derek
body:
The power of the people will get Democrats elected in November.
---
Last week, the Republican-controlled state House in Alabama decided to do away with special elections.

Yes, you read that right, Derek. Republicans in Alabama are so upset that Doug Jones won that THEY'RE TRYING TO CHANGE THE RULES.

This shows you a lot about the Republican Party. It shows just how ruthless they are when it comes to protecting the power they have -- and it shows just how scared they are. They're scared of the power of our movement. Let's keep it that way.

**Our first fundraising deadline of 2018 is tomorrow at midnight. Chip in $3 before this important deadline to keep electing Democrats and defeating Republicans.**

name: The White House
subject: Previewing tonight’s State of the Union
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2d25e94c72bcc42154c46ed0eb9349a1a794ad53172550f57859560f73245bddd0f65cce8a2e87254803e9472c5b9b556f4f88ced735863b

Previewing tonight’s State of the Union

Tonight at 9 p.m. ET, President Donald J. Trump will deliver his first State of the Union Address before Congress. The speech will outline the record-setting accomplishments of his first year and lay out the Administration’s vision for the next 12 months: building a safe, strong, and proud America.

A few important issues that you’ll certainly hear about tonight:

- Tax cuts and the economy: The biggest overhaul of the U.S. tax code in at least three decades is already fueling an economic boom.
- Infrastructure: President Trump will outline a $1 trillion investment for a large-scale, fast rebuild of America’s depleted infrastructure.
- Immigration: The President will explain his framework on immigration reform, including border security, DACA legalization, protecting the nuclear family, and replacing the visa lottery with a skills-based approach.
- Trade: Building on the President’s address at Davos last week, America will insist on trade deals that are fair and reciprocal.
- National security: America is returning to “peace through strength” in world affairs, making our stances clear to friends and enemies alike.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2d25e94c72bcc42124d4861ec9440d20d15a9c13e5e563f0e6f636c3ca2adc4dbf4f7351f313aa400b845559fe57c1c96d2a5b06de46519f
Watch the State of the Union Address live at 9 p.m. ET.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2d25e94c72bcc42100eb19773aefa07999a4e6ba4785915c6999b03b1a4217c3e8f1a8160adf11dedd1b17246b795ecca912b608a997d9ee
Bonus: See who President Trump and the First Lady invited to be tonight’s special guests.

The ‘denuking’ of North Korea

President Trump joined members of the United Nations Security Council for a lunch meeting yesterday, discussing “a range of security challenges, including the denuking of North Korea.” He was accompanied by Secretary of State Rex Tillerson, U.S. Ambassador to the UN Nikki Haley, Chief of Staff Gen. John Kelly, and National Security Adviser Gen. H. R. McMaster.

“We’re leading on the global stage to renew this founding principle of sovereignty,” the President told reporters before lunch. “I think we’re taking the world along with us.”

The meeting also covered how to counter Iran’s destabilization efforts across the Middle East, put an end to the conflict in Syria, and confront terrorism the world over.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2d25e94c72bcc421c93ef6bedfb445ba0eea764c9100716b6f4422a2dbc799e33fa4fad4525976b5067ff0c2848a30e59cbeabe58780fa8e
Read more from President Trump’s lunch with the UN Security Council.

Alex Azar sworn in as HHS secretary

Alex Azar, former Deputy Secretary for Health and Human Services under President George W. Bush, was sworn in yesterday as the newest official member of President Trump’s Cabinet.

“It’s a very special day for me, because we’ve been looking for this day for a long time,” the President said. “I’m thrilled to be here to administer the Oath of Office to America’s new Secretary of Health and Human Services, Mr. Alex Azar.”

“As you heard from the President today,” Secretary Azar said, the solemn charge of this office “includes his personal direction to me that we have to tackle the scourge of the opiate crisis, and we will bring down prescription drug prices.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2d25e94c72bcc421aac036a09b7de47df3c391213a6102dda6e0e67fcc47b16aa8202edcb1ec54fa85763d6d0152a77ebd9f5be1140d19ef
Read more of what President Trump and Secretary Azar told Americans yesterday.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and Vice President Mike Pence with newly sworn-in U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services Alex Azar and members of his family | January 29, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2d25e94c72bcc421dbc3bb5fe92680631215727df0d0585ff11ddb19756cf0bd92bea00a5c72494292fc8166fe0bc81a2489b15aab7eaca1

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Every morning on the way to work, Hoosiers hear plugs on the radio for the Koch brothers' extreme candidate. |
---

| | Imagine this, Peter.

Every morning on the way to work, Hoosiers hear plugs on the radio for the Koch brothers' extreme candidate. They see banner ads smearing the Affordable Care Act online in the office. At night, they see commercials from the RNC lying about Joe's record. And on Sundays, when they sit down to read the _Star_ , they see misleading ads about the GOP tax plan.

The blizzard of ads is closer than you think. Now that Republican megadonors have heard this race "leans Republican," we could be in that spot as soon as next week. That's why today's match is so important. Thanks to the group stepping up to double your contributions, grassroots donors can step up directly against Mitch McConnell, the Kochs, and the extreme special interests who want to replace Joe with their rubber stamp in the Senate.

name: Brendan McPhillips, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Hey, you deserve a say.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31f4/9e00690/43b18bc9/24039dca/680843913/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180130_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__BMP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180130_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__BMP&utm_content=1")

Hello --

We've only got one day left before our critical January deadline, and Andrew needs your help to give everyday people a voice. We've been fighting back against the Republicans -- including calling out the latest big TV ad for attacking immigrants, and it's making headlines.

**In fact, our movement has gained so much momentum that it 's now a threat to the Koch Brothers, and they've set their eyes -- and political agenda -- on Florida.**

**[We're only $5,650 away from our end-of-month goal so we need you to step up now to help fight back -- will you chip in $5?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31f4/9e00690/43b18bc9/24039dcd/680843913/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180130_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__BMP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180130_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__BMP&utm_content=2+-+Wersquore+only+5650+away+from+our+endofm")**

Andrew knows that we need someone to stand up and fight for everyday people who don't have a voice in government. He's never been afraid to give working people a say on the issues that impact our families; health care, public education, voting rights, the economy, climate change, and making this state more welcoming toward for everyone.

But right now Andrew needs your help to make that happen. We can't allow billionaire donors like the Koch Brothers attempt to silence the voice of Floridians just to further their own dangerous agenda.

Everyday people need good-paying jobs so they can support their families and access to quality public education to equip our children with the knowledge and tools they need -- no matter the zip code. They need someone who will fight for every Floridian, and for our immigrants. I know Andrew will do that on Day One when he's Governor, but he needs your help to get there.

**[We can't let the Koch Brothers buy this race. Chip in $5 and help us reach our end-of-month goal.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31f4/9e00690/43b18bc9/24039dcc/680843913/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180130_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__BMP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180130_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__BMP&utm_content=3+-+We+canrsquot+let+the+Koch+Brothers+buy+t")**

Thank you,

Brendan McPhillips
Campaign Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor

name: Leah
subject: Show the President you have his back!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Just over a year ago, the American people spoke up against politics as usual and elected the ultimate outsider: Donald Trump. Since then, the......

Friend,

Just over a year ago, the American people spoke up against politics as usual and elected the ultimate outsider: Donald Trump.

Since then, the media, Democrats, and the Washington establishment have teamed up to obstruct the Trump agenda and destroy his reputation.

And now, he's giving his first State of the Union Address.

**Chip in $3 right now -- before tomorrow's deadline -- to support the Democratic Party's critical organizing work as we kick off 2018.**
**[DONATE](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052228f/4067b0a/543da43cb/7e537c1a/1597608624/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/january-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20180130_abl_nd2&source=em_20180130_abl_nd2&refcode=em_20180130_abl_nd2")**

Derek --

I'm going to cut to the chase -- it's game time.

We won't take back Congress in November unless we start organizing today. With our first fundraising deadline of 2018 coming up tomorrow at midnight, now is the time to show you're ready to elect Democrats.

**Chip in $3 right now -- before our January deadline -- to support the Democratic Party's critical organizing work as we kick off 2018.**

We've got 280 days until Election Day. That might seem like a lot of time -- but believe me, it's not. We have so much work to do between now and then -- organizing isn't something you can do overnight.

We can't do it without your help, Derek. Together we must organize in every ZIP code by knocking on doors, registering voters, and getting our message out to the masses. That's how we win elections -- plain and simple.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Trump's contempt for our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Trump's contempt for our democracy and the rule of law knows no bottom.

We recently learned that President Trump tried to fire Special Counsel Mueller in an attempt to derail the investigation into collusion and Russian interference in our elections.

Never mind that Robert Mueller is a lifelong Republican, a decorated veteran, and someone who has served both Republican and Democratic presidents with distinction. Trump and his congressional Republican allies have made a concerted effort at every turn to undermine Mueller's investigation and to discredit the Special Counsel himself.

We cannot afford to let them get away with it.

[**The campaign to undermine Robert Mueller is symptomatic of an administration that has no respect for our democratic processes or the rule of law. Despite this, the Republican leadership continues to support Trump and place party over country. We must hold Republicans accountable and end their majority control. Can you help by making a donation before the end-of-month deadline tomorrow to support our fight to retake the Senate in 2018 and put this country back on track?**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de9186a/70cdc2ba/46f0d262/3903e5b/1716602082/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/democraticmajority18?refcode=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180130&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+The+campaign+to+undermine+Robert+Mueller&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180130&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180130")

As President of the United States, Donald Trump swore an oath to defend the Constitution. Yet he and his team have done absolutely nothing over the past year to address the threat of outside interference in our elections.

Instead, Trump and his allies have worked tirelessly to undermine the investigation by attacking the integrity of the FBI, politicizing intelligence gathering, and refusing to accept the unanimous judgment of our intelligence community regarding foreign interference in our democracy.

[**_Republican leaders have shown that they will say or do anything to cover up for this president and shield him from testifying in the Russia investigation. Can you step up today to support my efforts to make sure they don 't succeed?_**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de9186a/70cdc2ba/46f0d262/3903e58/1716602082/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/democraticmajority18?refcode=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180130&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Republican+leaders+have+shown+that+they+&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180130&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180130")

The last time a president fired a Special Counsel investigating him (Nixon's infamous Saturday Night Massacre), Republicans came together with Democrats to hold that president accountable. Unfortunately, today's Republican leadership has not only refused to hold Trump accountable for his blatant attacks on the rule of law, they are assisting in those attacks.

This is a historic moment. We need to stand up for our democracy.

Thank you for fighting with me,

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

---

---

10605 Concord Street, Suite 202
Kensington, MD 20895

subject: I get worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
I'm nervous. During Joe's 2012 campaign, Mitch McConnell, the Kochs, and their special interest allies spent $12 million trying to put a Republican puppet in Indiana's seat. |
---

| | Peter,

I'm nervous. During Joe's 2012 campaign, Mitch McConnell, the Kochs, and their special interest allies spent $12 million trying to put a Republican puppet in Indiana's seat. At the time, it took everything we had to hold them off and elect Joe. This year, they're going to make $12 million look like a drop in the bucket.

As Joe's finance director, sometimes I get worried when I think about the fact that this is going to be a $100 million race. But then I remember that Joe has the most dedicated team of grassroots supporters in the country. **When we put out the call in 2012, you stepped up big. And we know that with you by Joe 's side, we'll have the tools we need to bring it home again.**

**Can you prove me right by chipping in toward our end-of-January 200 new supporters goal? As Joe's finance director, sometimes I get worried when I think about the fact that this is going to be a $100 million race. But then I remember that Joe has the most dedicated team of grassroots supporters in the country. When we put out the call in 2012, you stepped up big. And we know that with you by Joe 's side, we'll have the tools we need to bring it home again. Can you prove me right by chipping in toward our end-of-January 200 new supporters goal? All donations we receive before February 1 will be MATCHED. | "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **** ""** ** ""** ** ""** ** ""** "" The $3 million the GOP has already spent attacking Joe is just a down payment, Peter. More dark money is coming. They'll keep the pressure up, and if they're unchecked they'll see their ads move the needle in the polls. But I know that you won 't let that happen. "" Thanks, Kelly ""** | Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206 ""

name: Geri Prado, EMILY's List
subject: These elections are only 2 weeks away!
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c54e7/24c69fd9/128c0baea/18950367/2597760476/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEM52N_digital_email_20180130_EOMFebruaryElections_inact&source=WQEFEM52N_digital_email_20180130_EOMFebruaryElections_inact")
---

Peter,

Our next elections are just two weeks away!

We've endorsed three pro-choice Democratic women running for state legislative seats in Minnesota and Florida with elections on February 12th and 13th.

Special elections like these are known for their unpredictability. So our support really can make the difference in these races.

**[Donate $3 to help reach our $150,000 End-of-Month goal and help our women win their special elections in just two weeks.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c54e7/24c69fd9/128c0baea/18950360/2597760476/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180128_email_EOMJanuary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+reach+our+150000+EndofM&utm_campaign=WQEFEM52N_digital_email_20180130_EOMFebruaryElections_inact&source=WQEFEM52N_digital_email_20180130_EOMFebruaryElections_inact")**

All three of the races our women are in are a little different. But they're each critically important for us to win:
**Karla Bigham (MN-SD54)** has a long record of advocating for her community. She's been a city councilor, state representative, and county commissioner. Several events are putting Republicans' control of the state Senate in danger, so we have to make sure Karla wins this race.

**Melissa Wagner (MN-HD23B)** is a school social worker running for the first time who could flip a seat in the Minnesota state House, one of the chambers we put "On Notice" for anti-choice legislation last year. No Democrat ran for this seat in 2012 and 2014, so this election is a chance to show we're competing everywhere.

**Margaret Good (FL-HD72)** is an attorney and community leader running to flip this seat. Even though this district leans red, we've already flipped seats that favored Trump by much higher margins. And helping Margaret win is critical to showing that Democrats have the momentum to win in Florida throughout this year.
Last year, we racked up a lot of state legislative wins and special election victories.

Now it's time to increase our efforts and show that we are still fired up to elect pro-choice Democratic women at every level, in every election -- not just every other November.

**Donate $3 to help hit our $150,000 End-of-Month goal and show that we still have the momentum to win this year:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-January-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c54e7/24c69fd9/128c0baea/18950361/2597760476/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180128_email_EOMJanuary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachJanuaryGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFEM52N_digital_email_20180130_EOMFebruaryElections_inact&source=WQEFEM52N_digital_email_20180130_EOMFebruaryElections_inact")**

Thanks,

Geri Prado
Senior Director of State & Local Campaigns, EMILY's List

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: Trump's SOTU
body:
Here's my takeaway from Trump's speech -- it's real simple...
---
Let me be very clear about something, Derek: We can stop the terrible, divisive agenda that Trump laid out tonight in his State of the Union -- but only if we take back Congress this year.

**[Chip in $3 right now -- before tomorrow's first fundraising deadline of 2018 -- if you're ready to elect Democrats in November. We can't do it without you.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522283/4067b0a/543325757/7e5353ef/2302315682/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trump-state-of-the-union?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+3+right+now++before+tomorrows+fi&utm_campaign=em_20180130_tp_nd&source=em_20180130_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180130_tp_nd")**

2018 is going to be our year, Derek. I'm so glad to have you with us.

Thanks,

Tom

Chair
Democratic National Committee
